channel.title: GitHub Vue Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

item.title: unilei/aipan-netdisk-search
item.description: 本项目乃是基于 Vue 与 Nuxt.js 技术打造的网盘搜索项目，持续开源并保持维护更新。其旨在让人人皆可拥有属于自己的网盘搜索网站。强烈建议自行部署，向所有参与者致敬！Salute to all!

item.title: requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: OpenCSGs/csghub
item.description: CSGHub is an open-source large model platform just like on-premise version of Hugging Face. You can easily manage models and datasets, deploy model applications and setup model finetune or inference jobs with user interface. CSGHub also provides Python SDK with full compatibility of hf sdk. Join us together to build a safer and more open platform⭐️

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: kailong321200875/vue-element-plus-admin
item.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

item.title: unovue/radix-vue
item.description: Vue port of Radix UI Primitives. An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

item.title: Moonofweisheng/wot-design-uni
item.description: 一个基于Vue3+TS开发的uni-app组件库，提供70+高质量组件，支持暗黑模式、国际化和自定义主题。

item.title: un-pany/v3-admin-vite
item.description: ☀️ A crafted admin template「vue admin / vue template / vue3 admin / vue3 template / vue3 后台 / vue3 模板」

item.title: Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
item.description: Free anti fingerprint browser, 指纹浏览器, 隐私浏览器, 免费的web3空投专用指纹浏览器

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: zxwk1998/vue-admin-better
item.description: 🎉 vue admin,vue3 admin,vue3.0 admin,vue后台管理,vue-admin,vue3.0-admin,admin,vue-admin,vue-element-admin,ant-design,vab admin pro,vab admin plus,vue admin plus,vue admin pro
